mapper.select: SELECT PRDCT_ID, BIZ_TYPE, KFB_ACCT_NO, LOAN_REQ_NO, LOAN_ACCPT_NO, PRDCT_CD, LOAN_DOC_INVSTGT_FLG FROM NF_TRADINFO_MGT WHERE CUST_NO=#{custNo} AND TRAD_NO=#{tradNo} WITH UR

SELECT A.ALLIANC_CD, A.APPRVER_CLERK_NO, A.APPRVL_DT, A.AUTHNT_IND, A.AUTHNT_IND_CD, A.AUTHNT_REQ_CMPLTN_DT, A.AUTHNT_REQ_DT, A.AUTHNT_REQ_EXPIRE_DT, A.BIZ_TYPE, A.BLK_CLERK_NO, A.BRNCH_NO, A.CALL_CNTR_STS_CD, A.CDD_CNFRM_DT, A.CDD_REQ_CD, A.CLERK_NO, A.CMPLTN_DT, A.CNCL_DT, A.CNNCTN_WAY, A.CUST_NO, A.DEL_OBJ_FLG, A.ID_CARD_CD, A.ID_CARD_CMPLTN_DT, A.ID_CARD_CNT, A.ID_CARD_REQ_DT, A.INIT_REGIST_DT, A.KFB_ACCT_NO, VARCHAR_FORMAT(A.LST_CHNG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') LST_CHNG_DT, A.NEW_USER_FLG, A.PRDCT_CD, A.PRDCT_ID, A.PRDCT_NM, A.PRGRSS_STS_CD, A.REQ_AMT, A.TRAD_NO, A.SEQ_NO AS SEQNO FROM NF_TRADINFO_MGT A WHERE A.CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND A.ID_CARD_CD = #{idCardCd} AND A.PRGRSS_STS_CD IN ('PRGS', 'DONE') AND A.TRAD_REG_GB = #{tradRegGb} WITH UR
SELECT PRDCT_ID ,PRDCT_NM ,BIZ_TYPE ,BRNCH_NO ,TO_CHAR(INIT_REGIST_DT,'yyyyMMdd') AS INIT_REGIST_DT FROM NF_TRADINFO_MGT WHERE TRAD_NO = #{tradNo} WITH UR
SELECT ID_CARD_CD, AUTHNT_IND_CD, CDD_REQ_CD FROM NF_TRADINFO_MGT WHERE CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND TRAD_NO = #{tradNo} WITH UR
